name: Múspell
description:
The god of Múspell, the Kingdom of Flame. His raging personality burns white-hot with a drive toward violence. Appears in Fire Emblem Heroes.

Here he comes! Múspell, the primeval god of a burning world of flames, has descended upon Askr!

If the flames roaring from his back weren't an indicator, Múspell has a wild, aggressive nature. You could say he's like the embodiment of fire itself!

Some time ago, Surtr, ruler of the Kingdom of Flame, inherited the power of Múspell through the Rite of Flames. With his god's strength coursing through his veins, Surtr embarked on an invasion of Nifl, the Kingdom of Ice.

Múspell had long been embroiled in conflict with the ice god Nifl—a ceaseless battle between the unstoppable flames of change and the impassive chill of eternal stillness. I wonder which side will win in the end...

Full Art By: Suzuhito Yasuda (ヤスダスズヒト)
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
